logout.label: Log Out
logout.confirmMessage: You'll need to sign in again to access your data.

deleteAccount.label: Delete my account
deleteAccount.confirmMessage: This action is irreversible. All your tasks, accountability partners and data will be permanently deleted.

privacyPage.intro: How Actio handles your data — last updated: June 26, 2026.

storage.title: Data storage
storage.body: Your tasks, accountability partners and preferences are currently stored locally on your device (and, for your account, encrypted). No cloud sync is active yet — uninstalling the app or switching devices will erase this data.

collected.title: Data we collect
collected.body: The content of your tasks and accountability partners; the contact you explicitly choose via the contact picker (we never access your full address book); your location only if you enable a location-based reminder; your profile picture if you choose one. None of this is collected unless you use the corresponding feature.

permissions.title: System access
permissions.body: Some features (alarms, importing contacts, location, profile picture...) require system permissions, which you can review and manage at any time.

payments.title: Payments (Pro subscription)
payments.body: If you subscribe to ACTIO Pro, payment is processed by our provider Moneroo. We never store your card details — they are handled directly by Moneroo under its own privacy terms.

sharing.title: Sharing with third parties
sharing.body: Actio does not sell or share your data with third parties for advertising purposes. The only current exception is payment processing via Moneroo (see above), strictly necessary to provide the service.

future.title: Planned changes
future.body: We plan to add cloud sync, notifications sent to your accountability partners, and AI-assisted task creation. These features will involve processing your data on our servers (no longer only on your device). This policy will be updated before each of these features is activated, and your consent will be requested if needed.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: You can request access, correction, deletion, or export of your data at any time by contacting us. As long as your data stays only on your device, you keep full control via Settings > Delete my account.

deletion.title: Deleting your data
deletion.body: You can delete your account and all your data at any time from Settings > Delete my account.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.body: For any question about this policy or your data, email us at supportactio@gmail.com.

garant.a: An Accountability Partner is someone you choose to be alerted if you haven't confirmed completing a task by its deadline.

alarm.a: When a task is due, Actio triggers a sound alarm. You can snooze it or confirm the task is done.

delay.q: What does the alert delay mean?
delay.a: It's the time left after a task's deadline before your accountability partner is notified, if you haven't confirmed anything in the meantime.

notifications.a: Check that the Notifications permission is enabled in Settings > Permissions, and that your phone isn't in Do Not Disturb mode.

language.q: How do I change the app's language?
language.a: Settings > Language & Region, then pick your language — the change applies immediately.

helpPage.contactFooter: Can't find the answer to your question?

permissionsPage.intro: Manage the system access used by Actio. You can change these at any time from your phone's settings.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.subtitle: Import an accountability partner from your contacts

battery.title: Battery optimization
battery.subtitle: Prevents Android from blocking your alarms in the background

languagePage.intro: Changes apply immediately, no confirmation needed.

language.title: App language
language.subtitle: Changes all text in the app, as well as the date format.

region.title: Time format
region.subtitle: Used for displaying times throughout the app.
